message:
test(workflows/context): add 9 LabRuntime cx-first tests for send_* functions

Cover all 4 cx-first workflow context methods (send_text_with_cx,
send_ctrl_c_with_cx, send_ctrl_d_with_cx, send_ctrl_z_with_cx) with:
- 4 no-injector error path tests
- 4 injector-present end-to-end tests via MockWezterm + PolicyEngine
- 1 pre-cancelled cx propagation test (verifies lock cancellation)

All 27 context tests pass (18 existing + 9 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
